form.comisieMembersPlaceholder: Comma-separated names (e.g. Ion Popescu, Maria Ionescu)

registru.noEntries: No entries in the register for this year.

messages.finalized: Session finalized and recorded in the inventory register.
messages.glPosted: Non-imputable differences posted to GL (D 607 / stock).
messages.confirmFinalize: Finalize this session? It will become immutable and recorded in the inventory register.
messages.confirmPostDiffs: Post non-imputable differences to GL? Imputable, VAT adjustment, and shrinkage cases must be posted manually (Accounting → Manual journals).
messages.confirmDelete: Delete this inventory session? This cannot be undone.
messages.noStock: No products with current stock found for pre-filling.
messages.glDeferredNote: NOTE: Imputable cases (461/4282 = 7588 + 4427), VAT adjustment on non-imputable shortage (635 = 4427), and shrinkage limits (HG 831/2004) are not auto-posted. Post them manually via Accounting → Manual journals.

inventory.empty: No inventory sessions for the selected company.
inventory.noLines: No lines. Use «Pre-fill from stock» or add lines manually.
